rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions; the cited rule governs school notices about military-related training programs. The two provisions address unrelated subjects.
quote: Sec. 29.9017. NOTICE REGARDING MILITARY-RELATED TRAINING PROGRAMS.
_note: Educ. Code §29.9017 is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption; no interaction found.
